article.title: UBER Freight - SDE - II : Round - 3
article.content:
Hi everyone,

I have Round - 3 scheduled for SDE-II at Uber Freight and would really appreciate any insights or guidance from those who’ve recently gone through the process.

I have a few specific questions:

1. What kind of questions they ask in ths round ?DSA or LLD or any others?
2. What is the difficulty level of the questions?

Any recent experiences, tips, or resources would be really helpful. Thanks in advance!

post.content: HI bro, can u share details of the first two rounds ?? it would be very helpful to others

I got hackerrank test  today
for backend engineeer

Can you quickly tell me about your first round dsa interview round...this will help me bcoz i've it in next 2 days....can you give insights... and how many questions they asked,(topics, did they want u to dry run and run the code on hackerRank?)
when your process started? got mail to setup introductory call on 20  May but didn't hear back after that from recruiter
